existing_features.title: Extend the token configuration to include a distinct human-friendly token symbol glyph for ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC (e.g., ₿, Ξ, $, or other clearly recognizable glyphs) and expose a helper to retrieve it by token key.
Display the token symbol glyphs for ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC in the Dashboard Tokens section so users can visually distinguish tokens at a glance.

Use the configured token symbol glyph consistently anywhere the token symbol is presented in the send/receive panels (headings, button text, and success messages), while keeping user-facing text in English.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add token symbols for ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC

projectName: Add ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC token symbols to the UI
